requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — SII Certification and Israeli Standards Adopting IEC Battery Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——SII认证及采纳IEC电池要求的以色列标准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——SII認證及採納IEC電池要求的以色列標準

summary.en: The Standards Institution of Israel (SII) is Israel's national standards body and certification route for products subject to mandatory Israeli Standards. For BESS cells, modules, battery packs, and associated industrial battery equipment, the applicable Israeli market-access path must be confirmed against current SII regulated-product scope and the project specification. In practice, Israel BESS projects normally require evidence aligned with Israeli Standards that adopt or reference IEC battery and electrical energy storage standards, including IEC 62619 for secondary lithium cells and batteries for industrial applications, IEC 62133 for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries where relevant to smaller battery assemblies, and IEC 62933-5-2 for electrochemical energy storage system safety. SII certification or formal confirmation that a product is outside mandatory SII scope is a gate to confirm before shipment.
summary.zh: 以色列标准协会（SII）是以色列国家标准机构，也是受强制性以色列标准管控产品的认证路径。对于BESS电芯、模组、电池包及相关工业电池设备，适用的以色列市场准入路径须依据现行SII受监管产品范围和项目规格确认。实践中，以色列BESS项目通常要求提供与采纳或引用IEC电池和电能储能标准的以色列标准一致的证据，包括适用于工业应用二次锂电芯和电池的IEC 62619、在较小电池组件相关时适用的IEC 62133，以及适用于电化学储能系统安全的IEC 62933-5-2。SII认证或产品不在强制SII范围内的正式确认，是出货前必须确认的门槛。
summary.zht: 以色列標準協會（SII）是以色列國家標準機構，也是受強制性以色列標準管控產品的認證路徑。對於BESS電芯、模組、電池包及相關工業電池設備，適用的以色列市場准入路徑須依據現行SII受監管產品範圍和項目規格確認。實踐中，以色列BESS項目通常要求提供與採納或引用IEC電池和電能儲能標準的以色列標準一致的證據，包括適用於工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池的IEC 62619、在較小電池組件相關時適用的IEC 62133，以及適用於電化學儲能系統安全的IEC 62933-5-2。SII認證或產品不在強制SII範圍內的正式確認，是出貨前必須確認的門檻。

standards_or_laws: SII mandatory Israeli Standards and Standards Mark / product certification route — confirm current scope directly with SII before shipment
IEC 62619:2022 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in industrial applications
IEC 62133 series — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary cells and batteries where relevant to smaller battery assemblies
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical energy storage systems — Safety requirements for electrochemical-based systems

summary.en: China-side BESS safety and system documentation is commonly prepared under GB/T 36558-2023 for electrochemical energy storage systems in power systems, GB/T 34120-2023 for distribution-network connection, and NB/T 42090-2016 for energy storage converter testing. These China standards can support technical understanding but are not SII certificates, are not Israeli Standards, and are not accepted as substitutes for SII certification or IEC-aligned evidence required by Israel project owners, conformity bodies, or grid reviewers.
summary.zh: 中国侧BESS安全和系统文件通常依据GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）、GB/T 34120-2023（接入配电网技术要求）以及NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）准备。这些中国标准可支持技术理解，但不是SII证书，不是以色列标准，也不被接受为以色列项目业主、合格评定机构或电网审查方要求的SII认证或IEC一致性证据的替代依据。
summary.zht: 中國側BESS安全和系統文件通常依據GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）、GB/T 34120-2023（接入配電網技術要求）以及NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）準備。這些中國標準可支持技術理解，但不是SII證書，不是以色列標準，也不被接受為以色列項目業主、合格評定機構或電網審查方要求的SII認證或IEC一致性證據的替代依據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Critical gap: China GB/T and NB/T evidence does not establish SII certification or Israeli Standard compliance. Exporters should: (a) ask SII or the appointed Israeli importer / conformity body to confirm whether the BESS cells, modules, racks, PCS, and complete containerized system fall under mandatory Israeli Standard certification; (b) obtain IEC 62619 and, where relevant, IEC 62133 and IEC 62933-5-2 test evidence from an accepted laboratory; (c) map each supplied battery configuration to the exact certificate scope; and (d) avoid representing Chinese GB/T compliance as equivalent to SII approval.
gap.zh: 关键差距：中国GB/T和NB/T证据不能证明SII认证或以色列标准合规。出口商应：（a）请SII或指定的以色列进口商/合格评定机构确认BESS电芯、模组、电池架、PCS及完整集装箱系统是否属于强制性以色列标准认证范围；（b）从可接受实验室取得IEC 62619以及在相关时IEC 62133和IEC 62933-5-2测试证据；（c）将每一种供应电池配置与证书范围逐项对应；（d）避免将中国GB/T合规表述为等同于SII批准。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：中國GB/T和NB/T證據不能證明SII認證或以色列標準合規。出口商應：（a）請SII或指定的以色列進口商/合格評定機構確認BESS電芯、模組、電池架、PCS及完整集裝箱系統是否屬於強制性以色列標準認證範圍；（b）從可接受實驗室取得IEC 62619以及在相關時IEC 62133和IEC 62933-5-2測試證據；（c）將每一種供應電池配置與證書範圍逐項對應；（d）避免將中國GB/T合規表述為等同於SII批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the product falls under an applicable mandatory Israeli Standard or project specification; SII certification or formal scope confirmation must be verified per project before shipment
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or project-specific depending on product scope and Chinese project approval; not transferable to Israel

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] SII certification and Israeli Standard scope must be confirmed before BESS shipment to Israel. Chinese GB/T 36558-2023, GB/T 34120-2023, and NB/T 42090-2016 documents are not substitutes for SII approval or IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933-5-2 evidence required by the Israeli project route. Confirm SII scope and certificate coverage with the importer, project owner, and conformity body before production release.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] BESS出货至以色列前必须确认SII认证和以色列标准适用范围。中国GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016文件不能替代SII批准，也不能替代以色列项目路径要求的IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933-5-2证据。量产放行前请与进口商、项目业主和合格评定机构确认SII范围及证书覆盖。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] BESS出貨至以色列前必須確認SII認證和以色列標準適用範圍。中國GB/T 36558-2023、GB/T 34120-2023和NB/T 42090-2016文件不能替代SII批准，也不能替代以色列項目路徑要求的IEC 62619 / IEC 62133 / IEC 62933-5-2證據。量產放行前請與進口商、項目業主和合格評定機構確認SII範圍及證書覆蓋。
